app.name: Koharu
app.one_liner: An ML-powered manga translation tool that automates text detection, OCR, inpainting, and LLM-driven translation with a focus on local execution and user privacy.

screens.name: Main Workspace
screens.purpose: Primary canvas for viewing and editing translated manga pages with interactive tools for zooming, panning, and deleting text blocks.

screens.name: Settings Panel
screens.purpose: Configure translation backends, model preferences, and export options.

rust_commands.name: export_psd
rust_commands.purpose: Exports the current page as a layered Photoshop PSD file with editable text layers.

rust_commands.name: save_project
rust_commands.purpose: Persists the current translation state for later editing.

rust_commands.name: translate_page
rust_commands.purpose: Orchestrates the full manga translation pipeline including detection, OCR, inpainting, and LLM translation.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add local LLM support via candle/llama.cpp
week 1: Implement core Rust pipeline: detection → OCR → inpainting → translation
week 1: Integrate Tauri GUI with basic canvas interaction
week 2: Add remote LLM fallback option
week 2: Enable PSD export with editable text layers
week 2: Implement HTTP API for automation
acceptance_tests: Application successfully translates a manga page using local models without sending data externally.
Exported PSD contains editable text layers matching detected regions.
User can delete a text block using the Del key and pan/zoom with Ctrl+drag and Ctrl+mouse wheel.
